prestazioni: AMG M256 E30 DEH LA GR hybrid inline-6 (EQ Boost 48V) full-stage 3 BorgWarner EFR 9280 turbo upgrade with billet compressor wheel, 106mm inducer, and 3.5-inch V-band inlet, paired with a custom AMG Performance Division ECU flash (Stage 3+) targeting 850+ hp and 950 Nm torque via methanol-water injection (AEM 3400cc/min kit) and upgraded AMG high-pressure fuel pump (Bosch CP4.2 dual-pump setup)

Full carbon-fiber driveshaft (Rohm Performance) and AMG-spec limited-slip differential (ZF 933 3.17:1 ratio) with Wavetrac torque-biasing technology, reinforced with a custom 4140 chromoly differential housing (Drexler Motorsport)

Bespoke KW Suspension Clubsport 3-way coilovers with remote reservoirs, 24-position rebound damping, and AMG-specific spring rates (front: 180 N/mm, rear: 220 N/mm), paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars (adjustable end links) and polyamide bushings (Powerflex Black Series)
estetica: Rocket Bunny Pandem EQS AMG widebody kit (carbon-fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with integrated OLED side markers (Luxx Lighting), requiring custom AMG-specific fender flares (35mm front, 40mm rear) and extended wheel arches

AMG Carbon-Fiber Exterior Package (official MB part #A2957800000) with gloss-black AMG forged wheels (21" front, 22" rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35 R21 front, 325/30 R22 rear), paired with AP Racing 400mm front and 380mm rear carbon-ceramic brake discs (CCM-X compound) with gold-anodized calipers (Brembo GT-R spec)

Custom AMG Night Package II (matte-black trim) with a full carbon-fiber front splitter (Vorsteiner GT-S) and rear wing (AMG Carbon-Fiber Wing Type 980, part #A2957890001) with active Gurney flap (adjustable via MBUX), finished with a 3M Satin Black vinyl wrap (Xpel Stealth) and red AMG door sills (illuminated, part #A2956000002)
